overall.description: A cinematic nighttime view of a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis (Cyberpunk 2077), showcasing towering skyscrapers with vibrant cyan neon lighting. The camera slowly pans across an elevated vantage point, revealing a large digital billboard advertisement and dense urban architecture with a moody, atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated cyberpunk city overlook between mega-towers

agents.ego_description: slowly panning the camera across the night cityscape from a high aerial vantage point, surveying the neon-lit urban canyon

entered.detail: dense cluster of towering dark buildings with grid-pattern illuminated windows forming the left skyline
multi-lane street below with sparse vehicle headlights and street illumination visible at ground level
massive building facade with prominent vertical cyan neon light strips running the full height
illuminated advertisement screen partially visible showing silhouette of figures, cut off by frame edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sweeping aerial view of a cyberpunk city at night. Towering skyscrapers with illuminated windows dominate the left side, while a massive building with vertical cyan neon strips anchors the right. Below, a multi-lane street shows sparse traffic. The camera slowly pans left, gradually revealing more of a large digital billboard on the right-side building.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk city canyon with prominent digital advertising display

events.description: digital billboard illumination increases revealing 'FERVID' text and detailed tennis player advertisement imagery

agents.ego_description: continuing the slow panoramic sweep of the cityscape, focusing on the illuminated billboard and neon architecture

segments.scene_description: The camera continues panning left, bringing the massive digital billboard fully into view. The billboard displays a 'FERVID' advertisement featuring athletic figures with tennis rackets. The vertical cyan neon strips of the adjacent building remain prominent as the camera maintains its slow drift, keeping the urban canyon and distant street visible in the center of the frame.

agents.ego_description: completing the panoramic sweep as the right-side structures exit the frame, revealing the central city vista

entered.detail: cluster of distant skyscrapers with warm yellow window lights visible through the gap between foreground buildings

segments.scene_description: As the camera completes its leftward pan, the large billboard and neon-lit building exit the frame to the right, opening up the view to the central cityscape. The focus shifts to the distant illuminated towers visible between the foreground skyscrapers, with the street below still showing sparse traffic movement. The scene concludes with a clear view of the urban canyon extending into the hazy distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, sweeping aerial pan across a cyberpunk metropolis at night, transitioning from a focus on a neon-lit skyscraper to a wide vista of the urban canyon. It begins with a view of towering buildings and sparse street traffic, with a massive structure featuring vertical cyan neon strips anchoring the right side of the frame. As the camera drifts left, the perspective shifts to fully reveal a large digital billboard displaying a Fervid advertisement with athletic figures. The scene then opens further as the billboard and neon building slide out of view, shifting the focus toward the distant, illuminated towers of the central cityscape. Finally, the movement settles on a deep view of the city's architecture extending into a moody, atmospheric haze.
